name: Ingrid Svensson
publicRole: SVP, Global Commercial Strategy, based in Chicago. Visits London for two weeks each quarter. Has Voss's ear. Her remit technically covers the player's entire division.
privateGoal: Ingrid is the person Voss trusts to tell her when the London office has become comfortable. She visits not to inspect but to calibrate — to understand the actual culture gap between Chicago and London and whether it is productive or complacent. She has ended two London Directors' careers without ever raising her voice or making a decision that looked like a personnel call.
contradiction: Presents as purely strategic — interested in systems, not people. Has an almost preternatural memory for individuals: what they said in a room two years ago, whether their delivery matched their framing, what face they made when challenged. She uses this as data. She has never described herself as a people person. She is one of the best at it in the building.

voicePattern.description: Economical. Rarely speaks first in a room. When she does, the room recalibrates. Asks questions by narrowing — starts general, gets specific, the specificity is always the one you weren't prepared for. No small talk.
voicePattern.tell: Goes quiet for longer than expected before responding to something she finds interesting. Most people take this as disapproval. Strategic Influence 70+ and Political Awareness 70+ understand the difference.
examplePhrases: What would have to be true for that to be correct?
I heard a different version of this from Chicago. Walk me through yours.
The gap between what you said and what you meant is interesting.
I'll need to think about that. Come find me before Thursday.

mbtiNote: INTJ. Chicago-formed. Has operated at pressure for long enough that the pressure is invisible to her. [NEVER SHOWN TO PLAYER]

arcBeats.description: Ingrid is present at the Meridian briefing room session. She does not speak. She is watching. The player will not know she was there until later.
Ingrid stops the player in a corridor during a London visit. She references something specific from the briefing room. The player has one exchange to make an impression.
If Relationship >= 35: Ingrid's assessment of the player reaches Voss's office as a footnote in a London review doc. The player never sees it. It surfaces mechanically in Y7.

relationshipThresholds.effect: Ingrid uses the player's name in a Chicago debrief. This is noted by two people in the room.
Ingrid routes one piece of Chicago strategic intelligence to the London team 'for context' — specifically to the player.
Ingrid's London review doc describes the player's team as 'adequately resourced.' The player is not mentioned individually.
relationshipThresholds.mechanical: No VP track boost in Y5–Y6 review cycle

careerTrajectory.event: Voss footnote fires if relationship qualifies.
Ingrid is promoted to EVP. Her London visits become less frequent and more consequential.
If Relationship >= 45: Ingrid is one of the four votes on the player's VP committee. She casts hers before anyone else speaks.
